lineage.Process: CalculateField fragments RETENTION 1 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField fragments RETENTION 1 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField fragments RETENTION "0.035 if !RETENTION! < 0.035 else !RETENTION!" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField fragments_Basecase RETENTION 0.035 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField fragments_Basecase RETENTION max(!RETENTION!, 0.035) PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField fragments RETENTION 0.01 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
